description_long: This object is a compact submachine gun, visually resembling the iconic MAC-10, with a boxy receiver and a short, cylindrical barrel protruding from the front. The silhouette reveals a prominent pistol grip and a trigger guard beneath the main body, with a magazine well integrated into the grip area. The upper receiver is rectangular and flat, with a small protrusion at the rear, likely representing the charging handle. The front and rear sights are minimally raised, consistent with basic iron sights. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external embellishments, emphasizing function over form. The finish appears matte and uniform, suggesting a metal construction with possible polymer components in the grip.
description: A compact, boxy submachine gun with a short barrel, pistol grip, and minimal iron sights, resembling a MAC-10. The finish is matte and utilitarian, with a focus on functional design.
description_view_0: The rifle is viewed directly from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and receiver, with the front sight and muzzle device visible.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the receiver, the short barrel, the pistol grip, and the trigger guard, with the magazine well integrated into the grip.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the receiver and the grip, with the rear sight and charging handle silhouette visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the receiver, barrel, grip, and trigger guard, with minor differences in side-mounted features.
